name: io.github.Francklin9999/mcpify
title: urlmcp
description: Turn any website into a runnable MCP server, in-process. Host-as-brain by default (no API key); optional OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/Groq/Ollama/custom inference.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_INFERENCE
environmentVariables.description: Server-side inference for forge_generate: host (default, no key) | heuristic | openai | claude | gemini | groq | together | openrouter | deepseek | mistral | fireworks | xai | ollama | lmstudio | vllm | openai-compatible | http. Accepts provider/model too.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Override the model for the selected provider.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_OPENAI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL when FORGE_INFERENCE=openai-compatible (any OpenAI-compatible endpoint).

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_INFERENCE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Custom inference endpoint when FORGE_INFERENCE=http (bring your own logic).

environmentVariables.name: URLMCP_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Where generated servers + registry.json are written (default ~/.urlmcp). Legacy MCP_FORGE_HOME / ~/.mcp-forge are still honored.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_ROBOTS
environmentVariables.description: Robots policy before scraping: respect (obey robots.txt) | full (ignore it; sites you own/are authorized for). Unset = the user is prompted, defaulting to respect.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_AUTH_HANDOFF
environmentVariables.description: When all stealth tiers still hit a sign-in/CAPTCHA wall, open a visible browser and wait for the user to sign in / solve it, then continue capturing the authenticated session (needs a display). Default on; set 0 to disable.

environmentVariables.name: SCRAPER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional: use a full Playwright scraper service for JS-rendered sites instead of the built-in static-fetch capture.
